lessons.title: Home Row - Left Hand
lessons.description: Learn the left home row keys: A S D F
lessons.instructions: Place your left fingers on A (pinky), S (ring), D (middle), F (index). Keep your fingers resting on these keys — this is the home position for your left hand.
exercises: aaa sss ddd fff aaa sss ddd fff
as sad dad fad ads
a sad lad a fad dad
add sad fads dads flask

lessons.title: Home Row - Right Hand
lessons.description: Learn the right home row keys: J K L ;
lessons.instructions: Place your right fingers on J (index), K (middle), L (ring), ; (pinky). Together with the left hand, you now have all 8 home row keys covered.
exercises: jjj kkk lll ;;; jjj kkk lll ;;;
jk kl lj jkl klj
jkl; ;lkj jklj lkjl
jk lk jlk klj jkl

lessons.title: Full Home Row
lessons.description: Combine both hands on the home row: A S D F J K L ;
lessons.instructions: Use both hands together. Left fingers on ASDF, right fingers on JKL;. Keep your wrists straight and fingers curved.
exercises: asdf jkl; asdf jkl; fdsa ;lkj
add ask fad lad fall flask
a sad dad shall fall all
fall lads flash glad ask flak

lessons.title: Adding E and I
lessons.description: Introduce E (left middle finger up) and I (right middle finger up)
lessons.instructions: From D, reach your left middle finger up to E. From K, reach your right middle finger up to I. Return to home row after each keystroke.
exercises: de de de ki ki ki ded kik
side idea file like self feel
a life of ease slide ideas fill
fidelity ideal silk side leaf

lessons.title: Adding T and N
lessons.description: Introduce T (left index up) and N (right index down)
lessons.instructions: From F, reach your left index finger up to T. From J, reach your right index finger down to N. These are very common letters!
exercises: tf tf nj nj tft njn
tin tan ten not net ten
and the not that tin tent
attend talent intentantine then

lessons.title: Adding R and O
lessons.description: Introduce R (left index up-left) and O (right ring finger up)
lessons.instructions: From F, reach left index to R. From L, reach right ring finger up to O. Keep other fingers on home row.
exercises: rf rf ol ol rfr olo
for nor our or road lord
order floor error rotor oral
for real or nor is a total

lessons.title: Top Row Introduction
lessons.description: Learn the full top row: Q W E R T Y U I O P
lessons.instructions: The top row keys are reached by extending fingers upward from home row. Practice reaching each key and returning to home position.
exercises: qwerty uiop qwerty uiop
with your type write power
people quiet property report tower
we were quite proper you wrote

lessons.title: Bottom Row Introduction
lessons.description: Learn the bottom row: Z X C V B N M
lessons.instructions: Bottom row keys are reached by curling fingers downward from home row. Z with left pinky, X with left ring, C with left middle, V and B with left index.
exercises: zxcv bnm zxcv bnm
come back move next box calm
combine mix combine brave complex
zoom back cave venom maximum

lessons.title: Common Words
lessons.description: Practice the most common English words
lessons.instructions: Type the most frequently used English words. Focus on rhythm and accuracy over speed.
exercises: the and to a of it is in that was
he she for on are with as at his
they be this from had not but what
all were when there can an said each

lessons.title: Capital Letters
lessons.description: Practice using the Shift key for capital letters
lessons.instructions: Use the opposite hand's Shift key for capitals. Left Shift for right-hand keys, Right Shift for left-hand keys. Keep your pinky on Shift and return to home row.
exercises: The And A Of In That Was For
Alice Bob Carol Dave Eve Frank
London Paris Tokyo New York Rome
The quick brown fox jumps high

lessons.title: Numbers Row
lessons.instructions: Numbers are typed with the same finger as the key below them, stretching upward from the top row. Practice reaching each number and returning to home position.
exercises: the 1st and 2nd of 10 items
add 42 and 58 to get 100
room 304 floor 12 exit 7

lessons.title: Punctuation
lessons.instructions: Punctuation marks are essential for proper sentences. Use your right pinky for most punctuation. Take care with Shift for ! ? :
exercises: Hello, world! How are you?
Wait: stop, look, and listen.
Yes! No. Maybe? Certainly!
Run, jump, climb; swim, dive, fly.

lessons.title: Full Sentences
lessons.description: Type complete sentences with all keys
lessons.instructions: Combine everything you have learned. Focus on maintaining a steady rhythm. Speed will come naturally with practice.
exercises: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog.
Pack my box with five dozen liquor jugs.
How vexingly quick daft zebras jump.
The five boxing wizards jump quickly.

lessons.title: Speed Drill - Short Words
lessons.description: Build speed with short, common words
lessons.instructions: Type as fast as you can while maintaining accuracy. Short words let you develop a rapid typing rhythm.
exercises: the and for are but not you all any can
had her was one our out day get has him
his how man new now old see two way who
did its let put say she too use may end

lessons.title: Speed Drill - Paragraphs
lessons.description: Type full paragraphs to build sustained speed
lessons.instructions: Maintain your speed and accuracy across longer text. Keep a steady rhythm without looking at the keyboard.
exercises: Practice makes perfect when it comes to typing. The more you type, the faster and more accurate you will become over time.
Touch typing is a method where you use all ten fingers and do not look at the keyboard while typing. It takes time to learn but pays off greatly.
The best typists can reach speeds of over 100 words per minute. They achieve this through years of consistent daily practice and focus.
Learning to type without looking at the keys is a skill that will serve you for the rest of your life. Start slow and build up speed gradually.
